honest_caveat: This is NOT a metastasis replay — the cohort lacks M-stage. The AUROC here reflects how well TOP2A-EPAS1 separates tumor from normal, which is expected to be high given the proliferation gradient and the HIF-2α program both differ across tumor/normal. Interpret as a sanity check, not as evidence for the metastasis claim.

data_source: cBioPortal rcc_cptac_gdc RNA TPM + GDC API M-staging (pathologic preferred, clinical fallback)
honest_caveat: Direction preserved (high TOP2A-EPAS1 -> M1, p=0.006). Gate FAIL on ci_lower (0.54 < 0.60 threshold) and delta_baseline (-0.007; TOP2A alone 0.691 slightly outperforms compound 0.683). Power simulation confirms n_m1=20 is insufficient for ci_lower > 0.60 at AUROC 0.683; would need n_m1>=40. 75/155 known-M-stage patients have clinical (imaging-only) M designation. The compound law's direction generalizes; the delta advantage vs TOP2A alone does not survive the smaller cohort.
